name: Tap Oil Limited
description: Tap Oil Limited is an independent oil and gas exploration and production company with a strategic focus on assets in Australia and South East Asia. Headquartered in Perth, Western Australia, the company was incorporated in 1995 and listed on the Australian Securities Exchange. Tap Oil is primarily engaged in the exploration, development, and production of oil and gas resources, with significant operations in the Gulf of Thailand. The company aims to create shareholder value by maintaining a balanced portfolio of moderate-risk, high-impact exploration opportunities alongside its established production and gas marketing activities.
